question: Run Annotation on all recorded episodes and summarize.
ground_truth: This README Quick Run prompt routes to VLM annotation over the latest recorded HDF5 episodes and returns a summary.
expected_behavior: uses the latest recorded HDF5 episodes
uses the env YAML task description unless overridden

question: Run the VLM annotator on my scissor pick-and-place recording and label which episodes satisfy the task.
ground_truth: This README skill-table prompt routes to VLM annotation for a scissor_pick_and_place recording.
expected_behavior: labels episodes against the task criterion
does not run annotation when only conversion or replay is requested
